emails.subject: RE: Smurfit-Stone
emails.body: RE: Smurfit-Stone I just talked to Jay and he doesn't want to do a long term deal with them. I have a call in to the consultant. Max Jay might agree to is 3 months.

emails.subject: RE: Smurfit-Stone
emails.body: So the plan is to provide for a netting arrangement. Even though you would handle the gas, EPMI would legally sell it to them so we could net this cost with the power revenue we would receive and we have a significant L/C on the power side. Longer term if we cannot get approval for up 3 6 months this deal will not be good for us so we need to keep the pressure on credit. C
